subject: docs(claude): align CLAUDE.md with glow-props Implementation Patterns
body:
Sync shared scaffolding terminology and add the standard Implementation
Patterns section from glow-props so downstream AI assistants know to
fetch patterns remotely instead of looking for local copies.

- Rename "Suggested Implementations" → "Implementation Patterns" in
  scaffolding description
- Replace stale "Sister project reference" AI Note with implementation
  patterns fetch-from-source note
- Add "Implementation Patterns (Source of Truth)" section with fetch
  commands and rules after Triggers
- Add prohibition against creating local pattern file copies

Tags: docs, alignment, claude-md
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-project-alignment
Semver: patch
